description_long: This is a male adult dressed in full tactical gear, resembling a SWAT officer. He wears a protective helmet with goggles, a tactical vest with multiple pouches, and reinforced gloves. His uniform includes a long-sleeve shirt and cargo pants, both designed for durability and mobility, with knee pads for added protection. The back of his vest is labeled 'SWAT', and he carries utility items such as a holstered sidearm and additional gear attached to his belt. Heavy-duty boots and body armor complete his outfit, indicating readiness for urban operations. The overall appearance is that of a well-equipped law enforcement or special response team member.
description: A male adult in full SWAT tactical gear, including helmet, vest, and utility belt, prepared for urban law enforcement operations.
description_view_0: Front view showing helmet with goggles, tactical vest, gloves, and utility belt.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the helmet profile, holstered sidearm, and knee pads.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying 'SWAT' label on the vest, back of helmet, and gear attachments.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the tactical vest, gloves, and side profile of the boots.
attribute_clothing_type: tactical uniform with body armor, helmet, gloves, and utility vest
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
